query:
SELECT ph.wallet_address, ph.transaction_type, ph.points_change, ph.balance_after, ph.description, ph.created_at, wp.total_points as current_points
FROM points_history ph
LEFT JOIN wallet_profiles wp ON ph.wallet_address = wp.wallet_address
WHERE ph.transaction_type IN ('x_disconnect', 'discord_disconnect')
ORDER BY ph.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
